use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF THE SIGNS AND SYMPTOMS OF DRY EYE DISEASE (DED)

indications.text:
TYRVAYA (varenicline solution) nasal spray is indicated for the treatment of the signs and
symptoms of dry eye disease.
